landing.hero_title: Track your progress during shoulder recovery
landing.hero_subtitle: A digital clinical tracking system to record pain, mobility, adherence and evolution over 6 weeks.
landing.benefits_title: Why use the Active Shoulder Protocol?
landing.benefit1_desc: Record your pain, mobility and adherence every day in less than 2 minutes.
landing.benefit2_desc: Visualize your evolution week by week with clear charts.
landing.benefit3_desc: Your doctor receives notifications if your pain increases or you stop logging.
landing.benefit4_desc: After completing 6 weeks you get a detailed clinical report.
landing.benefit5_desc: Dr. Rebollón monitors your progress in real time.
landing.benefit6_desc: Works on mobile, tablet and computer — no app download needed.
landing.step1_desc: Sign up in less than a minute and complete your medical profile.
landing.step2_desc: Answer 7 simple questions about your pain and daily activity.
landing.step3_desc: View pain, adherence and Recovery Score charts in real time.
landing.step4_desc: After 6 weeks, download your personalized clinical report.
landing.features_title: Everything you need for your recovery
landing.feature1: Visual pain scale 0–10 with intuitive colors
landing.faq1_q: Do I need to be a patient of Dr. Rebollón to use the platform?
landing.faq1_a: Yes, this platform is designed exclusively for patients under Dr. Carlos Rebollón's active shoulder protocol.
landing.faq2_q: How long does daily progress logging take?
landing.faq2_a: Less than 2 minutes. There are 7 simple questions you can answer from your phone.
landing.faq3_q: Can the doctor see my records?
landing.faq3_a: Yes. Dr. Rebollón has access to your progress and receives alerts if there are important changes in your evolution.
landing.faq4_q: What happens if I miss a day?
landing.faq4_a: The system records the absence. If you don't log for 3 consecutive days, the doctor receives an inactivity alert.
landing.faq5_a: Yes. After completing 6 weeks you can download your final report in PDF with all your clinical data.
landing.disclaimer: This platform is a clinical tracking tool. It does not replace in-person medical consultation. If pain suddenly worsens, stop exercises and contact your doctor.
landing.access_subtitle: Dr. Rebollón will personally review your request and contact you within 24 hours.
landing.access_how: How did you find the Protocol? (optional)
landing.access_how_placeholder: Social media, referred by a doctor, internet search...
landing.access_success_desc: Dr. Rebollón will review your request and you will receive an email with your access link within 24 hours.
landing.access_required: First name, last name and email are required.
landing.access_privacy_required: You must accept the Privacy Policy.
landing.hero_eyebrow: ACTIVE SHOULDER PROTOCOL · DR. CARLOS REBOLLÓN
landing.hero_h1b: And it doesn't always require surgery.
landing.hero_sub: A 6-week conservative recovery program, designed by an orthopedic surgeon specializing in shoulder and elbow, so you can recover your shoulder with real clinical guidance — and continuous medical supervision.
landing.hero_cta1: I want to recover my mobility
landing.prob_h2: Why do many patients with shoulder pain fail to fully recover?
landing.prob_body_pre: You may have had weeks of therapy, exercises, anti-inflammatories. But without structured follow-up, without continuous monitoring and without a system that detects your real progress, many patients don't fully recover.
landing.prob_body_bold: The problem isn't just the shoulder. It's the lack of support during recovery.
landing.prob_pain1: Weeks without knowing if you're progressing correctly
landing.prob_pain2: Abandoning exercises due to lack of guidance and motivation
landing.cmp_old3: Not knowing if pain is normal
landing.cmp_new1: Daily log in less than 2 minutes
landing.cmp_new2: Your orthopedic surgeon monitors your progress
landing.cmp_new3: Automatic alerts if there are warning signs
landing.how2_s1_desc: Complete your profile and begin your personalized 42-day conservative recovery protocol.
landing.how2_s2_title: You log your day in 2 minutes
landing.how2_s2_desc: Each day you answer simple questions about your pain, mobility and wellbeing. Straightforward, from your phone.
landing.how2_s3_desc: Dr. Rebollón monitors your progress in real time. If something is off, he detects it before you do.
landing.how2_s4_title: You complete your recovery with evidence
landing.how2_s4_desc: At the end of 6 weeks, you download your complete clinical report — a real document of your progress.
landing.diff1_q1: There are two types of patients.
landing.diff1_q2: Those who feel they are improving.
landing.diff1_q3: And those who know they are improving.
landing.diff1_q4: The Active Shoulder Protocol turns the feeling into clinical evidence.
landing.diff2_l2: You've had pain level 7 for 4 days.
landing.diff2_l3: You don't know if it's normal or if something is wrong.
landing.diff2_l5: you wait for your next appointment.
landing.diff2_l7: Dr. Rebollón already received an automatic alert this morning.
landing.diff2_l8: And he already knows he needs to contact you.
landing.diff3_b1: The tracker is not an app.
landing.diff3_b2: It's the peace of mind of knowing that someone with real clinical expertise is watching your progress.
landing.diff3_b3: Every day. Week by week. During the 42 most important days of your recovery.
landing.diff3_c1_body: Digital EVA scale. You know exactly if your shoulder is improving or just coping.
landing.diff3_c2_body: Dr. Rebollón sees your progress. Not at the next appointment. Now.
landing.diff3_c3_body: If your pain increases or you stop logging, Dr. Rebollón knows before you do.
landing.diff3_c4_body: 42 documented days. A real clinical PDF of your recovery.
landing.diff4_h2: No rehabilitation program in Panama does this.
landing.diff4_b1: If for 3 consecutive days your pain doesn't improve or you stop logging progress,
landing.diff4_b2: Dr. Rebollón receives an automatic alert.
landing.diff4_b3: Because no other program was designed by someone who operates on shoulders.
landing.diff4_b4: That alert can change the outcome of your recovery.
landing.trans_h2: How will you feel after completing the 6 weeks?
landing.trans_c1: Moving without pain in your daily life
landing.trans_c2: Recovering the full range of motion in your shoulder
landing.trans_c3: Returning to the activities that matter most to you — without thinking about surgery
landing.auth_bold: First orthopedic surgeon in Panama to implement an intelligent digital monitoring system for conservative shoulder recovery.
landing.auth_pt1: Specialist in shoulder, elbow and knee pathology
landing.auth_pt2: Training in Edinburgh, Madrid, Paris, Cambridge, Annecy and São Paulo
landing.auth_pt3: The only specialist in Panama who decides daily which shoulders are operated on — and which are not
landing.price_h2a: The program gives you the knowledge.
landing.price_h2b: The tracker gives you the certainty.
landing.price_anchor: Exclusive access for Active Shoulder Protocol participants.

auth.demo_hint: Demo: use any email and password

onboarding.step2_subtitle: Define when you started your recovery program.
onboarding.slide1_desc: Every day answer 7 questions about your pain, mobility and exercise compliance.
onboarding.slide2_desc: Interactive charts show your progress week by week.
onboarding.slide3_desc: After completing 6 weeks you get a personalized clinical report.

dashboard.status_critical: You need to resume the program

tracking.title: Today's log
tracking.subtitle: Takes 2 minutes. Record how you're doing today.
tracking.exercises_label: Did you complete your exercises today?
tracking.already_logged: You already logged your progress today

report.title: Final Recovery Report
report.subtitle: Active Shoulder Protocol — 6 weeks
report.good_desc: The patient shows satisfactory recovery. Continuing with progressive strengthening exercises is recommended.
report.partial_desc: The patient shows partial improvement. Continuing the program with a follow-up medical evaluation is recommended.
report.poor_desc: The patient requires urgent in-person evaluation to adjust the protocol.
